name: python3-poetry-core
title: python3-poetry-core
description:
Poetry PEP 517 Build Backend
A PEP 517 build backend implementation developed for Poetry. This project
is intended to be a light weight, fully compliant, self-contained package
allowing PEP 517 compatible build frontends to build Poetry managed projects.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-poetry-core because Poetry PEP 517 Build Backend.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-poetry-core as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-poetry-core with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-poetry-core --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
